name: NyxQueen 4Wave Diode Laser (Peony)
shortDescription: The NyxQueen diode laser in pearlescent pink (peony) finish. 600W power, 4 wavelengths, 50 million shot lifespan. The same cutting-edge technology with a feminine peony appearance.
description: The NyxQueen diode laser peony edition – the same professional-grade 600W power and 4-wavelength system in a pearlescent pink finish. A perfect choice for those looking for a device that matches a feminine, elegant salon ambiance.
metaTitle: NyxQueen Diode Laser Peony | 600W, 4 wavelengths, 50M shots
metaDescription: NyxQueen 600W diode laser in pearlescent pink (peony) finish. 4 wavelengths (755, 808, 940, 1064 nm), 50M shots, advanced cooling. 2-year warranty.
